title: StructuredError
description: The machine-parseable object returned to the model's next context window on any reject verdict (FR-003, FR-005, SC-003). The ONLY shape of rejection the model sees — free-text apologies from the tool channel are forbidden. Without this object the kata's anti-pattern defense collapses.

verdict.description: StructuredError is emitted only on reject verdicts. Allow has no error object.

field.description: Dotted path of the offending field ('amount', '$' for whole-payload).

policy_snapshot_version.description: Non-null iff reason_code == 'policy_breach'. Pins the evaluated snapshot for audit reconstruction.

correlation_id.description: Joins this error to the audit log entry, HookVerdict, EscalationEvent, and model turn.

escalation_pathway.description: Routing target for policy_breach; an internal route for hook_failure; 'client_fix_required' for schema_violation.

message.description: Deterministic short English summary built from the structured fields. NOT the enforcement mechanism — exists only as human-readable UX.

allOf.description: On policy_breach the policy identifiers MUST be populated; on schema_violation / hook_failure they MUST be null.
